name: Deimond alcynt ryniox kayfrost
description:
A dragon that can change beetwen an ancient bestial form, a dragon that is taller than a castle or an anthro dragon that is the size of a tree .

Will you be the one to help him bring peace to this chaotic and crazy world? or you will be just another obstacle on your path to peace and harmony?

This is my first test of making character so dont expect to be soo good, but i accept hints or tips
creator: Darkytooney
